scope: Startup-focused agriculture and allied-sector opportunities discovered through official incubator-linked portals

source_coverage.incubator_directory_policy: Discovery only; directory entries are never published as schemes or calls.

newly_validated_records: MANAGE Digital Marketing Skills for Agri-Startups Ninth Batch
AFBIC IIT Kharagpur SAIP/AOP/SOP programme identities
ABIF IIT Kharagpur incubation application identity

not_promoted_to_calls.source: MANAGE training calendar and scheduled events
not_promoted_to_calls.reason: Training, webinars and stakeholder events without a dated application window are not treated as grant or application calls.
Incubator names and addresses are discovery sources, not opportunities for applicants.
Programme applications are visible, but no official closing date is stated; records remain programme identities/status-unverified.

next_discovery_targets: R-ABI portals listed by MANAGE, including KAU, Nutrihub, UAS Dharwad and ICAR/IIT partner pages
Archived cohort posters and application PDFs for MANAGE Cohorts 4-14
Future dated calls published by PDKV-RIF, AFBIC and ABIF
publication_guardrail: Do not inflate the call count with the hundreds of applicants, incubated startups, training sessions or directory entries reported by incubator sources. Each public record must represent one unique scheme, programme, call or challenge with its own official evidence.
